name: symbols
description: Symbols MCP plugin for semantic code navigation, language server setup, and troubleshooting.

interface.longDescription: Use Symbols to configure language servers, inspect runtime state, and navigate code semantically through LSP-backed tools and resources.
defaultPrompt: Enable a language server for this repo with Symbols
Use Symbols to inspect this codebase semantically
Troubleshoot why this LSP is not working in Symbols
